positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical celestial journey. Central composition features a large, stylized crescent moon giving way to a cascade of bioluminescent stars, rendered as abstract constellations and glowing, ethereal nebulas. The primary color palette should utilize deep indigo, midnight blue, soft silver, and pops of glowing cyan and magenta. Include simple, elegant geometric overlays, such as interconnected line art representing constellations, that are subtle but impactful. The style must be vector-graphic illustration, combining clean, sharp silhouettes with gradient luminescence, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, high contrast, and deeply mystical. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blur, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, grunge, photorealistic, painting, gradient noise
